nasb.text: “Son of man, write the name of the day, this very day. The king of Babylon has laid siege to Jerusalem this very day.

esv.text: “Son of man, write down the name of this day, this very day. The king of Babylon has laid siege to Jerusalem this very day.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要記下今天的日子，正正是今天，因為巴比倫王就是在這一天圍困耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: “人子啊，今天是巴比伦王围攻耶路撒冷的日子，你要记下这日子。
